---
title: "Lucy Margaret Lonsdale"
---

## Lucy Margaret Lonsdale

**Dates:** (b. 1846)

### Description

member of the Gosling Society

### Biography

She was a Gosling as ‘Magpie’ from June 1864, her address Westbourne Terrace/ the Close, Litchfield;  she was the daughter of Rev. Canon John Gylby Lonsdale (1818-1907), canon of Lichfield Cathedral, and Sarah Martinson.  Her grandfather had been Bishop of Lichfield.  She might be the Margaret Lonsdale who published (1880) a biography of Sister Dora (Dorothy Pattison 1832-1878) and <i>The Care and Nursing of Children</i> (1885) which seems to reprint lectures addressed to GFS girls [IGI, 1871 census, BBI, DNB]

### Letters

- Letter from May 25 th [1867]
- Letter from [12 January 1866]
- Letter from Decr 7th [1864]
- Letter from Novr 22d 1864

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
